attribution: Symbols Author: Sergio Palao. Origin: ARASAAC (https://arasaac.org). License: CC (BY-NC-SA). Owner: Government of Aragón (Spain).
modifications: Symbols stored as their native ARASAAC PNG with transparent background (approximately 500x500 from the public API). No re-encoding applied. Runtime tinting per Fitzgerald category is performed at render time and is not a derivative asset.

checksum_policy.build_gate: Run `dart run tools/verify_assets.dart` from repo root. The verifier recomputes sha256 for every manifest entry's icon_uri on disk and exits 1 on any mismatch, missing file, or empty sha256. Detects silent post-commit asset mutation (build pipeline bug, contributor accident, supply-chain tampering).
